Home / Services / Urgent & Emergency Care

Urgent & Emergency Care

Prompt attention for unexpected illnesses and injuries during business hours.

When your pet needs urgent care, our team provides prompt, compassionate attention during our regular hours. While we're not a 24-hour emergency clinic, we handle many urgent cases that don't require overnight monitoring.

Common emergencies we treat include toxin ingestion (especially mushrooms in our wooded areas), wounds from wildlife encounters, and sudden illnesses. We maintain well-stocked treatment areas and diagnostic equipment to assess and stabilize patients quickly.

For after-hours emergencies, we partner with local 24-hour facilities to ensure continuity of care. We'll provide all necessary records and follow up personally when your pet returns home.

Our Process

  1. 01 Step 1: Immediate triage assessment upon arrival
  2. 02 Step 2: Stabilization and pain management as needed
  3. 03 Step 3: Diagnostic testing and treatment plan development
  4. 04 Step 4: Clear discharge instructions and follow-up plan

Benefits

  • Rapid response to urgent health concerns
  • Continuity of care with your regular vet
  • Compassionate support during stressful situations
  • Coordination with specialists when needed

Frequently Asked Questions

What constitutes a veterinary emergency?

Difficulty breathing, seizures, uncontrolled bleeding, toxin ingestion, inability to urinate, or severe trauma always require immediate attention.

Do I need to call ahead for emergencies?

Calling en route helps us prepare, but come immediately if it's truly urgent. We'll triage based on severity upon arrival.

What emergency supplies should Asheville pet owners have?

We recommend keeping pet-safe ice melt, a pet first aid kit, and the numbers for our clinic and the nearest 24-hour facility readily available.

Book an Appointment

Ready to get started with urgent & emergency care? Contact us today.

Schedule Now Or call: 555-vet-r90
